illusion.flavor: The Pokémon fools opponents by entering battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its Trainer's party.

iron-barbs.desc: Inflicts damage to the Pokémon on contact.
iron-barbs.effect_short: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
iron-barbs.effect_long: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage.  This ability functions identically to rough skin.
iron-barbs.flavor: Inflicts damage on the attacker upon contact with iron barbs.

slush-rush.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a hailstorm.
slush-rush.effect_short: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.
slush-rush.effect_long: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.
slush-rush.flavor: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in snow.

turboblaze.desc: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.
turboblaze.effect_short: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.
turboblaze.effect_long: This Pokémon's moves completely ignore abilities that could hinder or prevent their effect on the target.  For example, this Pokémon's moves ignore abilities that would fully negate them, such as water absorb; abilities that would prevent any of their effects, such as clear body, shell armor, or sticky hold; and abilities that grant any general protective benefit, such as simple, snow cloak, or thick fat.  If an ability could either hinder or help this Pokémon's moves, e.g. dry skin or unaware, the ability is ignored either way.  Abilities that do not fit this description, even if they could hinder moves in some other way, are not affected.  For example, cursed body only affects potential future uses of the move, while liquid ooze and shadow tag can only hinder a move's effect on the user.  This ablity cannot ignore type or form changes granted by abilities, for example color change or forecast; nor effects that were caused by abilities but are no longer tied to an ability, such as the rain from drizzle.  This ability cannot ignore multitype at all.  An ability ignored by this ability is only nullified while the move is being used.  For example, this Pokémon's moves can paralyze a Pokémon with limber, but Limber will activate and heal the paralysis immediately thereafter, and this Pokémon's spikes are not affected by this ability after they have been placed.  When this Pokémon enters battle, all participating trainers are notified that it has this ability.  This ability functions identically to mold breaker and teravolt.
turboblaze.flavor: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

teravolt.desc: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.
teravolt.effect_short: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.
teravolt.effect_long: This Pokémon's moves completely ignore abilities that could hinder or prevent their effect on the target.  For example, this Pokémon's moves ignore abilities that would fully negate them, such as water absorb; abilities that would prevent any of their effects, such as clear body, shell armor, or sticky hold; and abilities that grant any general protective benefit, such as simple, snow cloak, or thick fat.  If an ability could either hinder or help this Pokémon's moves, e.g. dry skin or unaware, the ability is ignored either way.  Abilities that do not fit this description, even if they could hinder moves in some other way, are not affected.  For example, cursed body only affects potential future uses of the move, while liquid ooze and shadow tag can only hinder a move's effect on the user.  This ablity cannot ignore type or form changes granted by abilities, for example color change or forecast; nor effects that were caused by abilities but are no longer tied to an ability, such as the rain from drizzle.  This ability cannot ignore multitype at all.  An ability ignored by this ability is only nullified while the move is being used.  For example, this Pokémon's moves can paralyze a Pokémon with limber, but Limber will activate and heal the paralysis immediately thereafter, and this Pokémon's spikes are not affected by this ability after they have been placed.  When this Pokémon enters battle, all participating trainers are notified that it has this ability.  This ability functions identically to mold breaker and turboblaze.
teravolt.flavor: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

bulletproof.desc: Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.
bulletproof.effect_short: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
bulletproof.effect_long: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
bulletproof.flavor: Protects the Pokémon from ball and bomb moves.

magician.desc: The Pokémon steals the held item of a Pokémon it hits with a move.
magician.effect_short: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.
magician.effect_long: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.
magician.flavor: The Pokémon steals the held item from any target it hits with a move.

cheek-pouch.desc: Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.
cheek-pouch.effect_short: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.
cheek-pouch.effect_long: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.
cheek-pouch.flavor: The Pokémon's HP is restored when it eats any Berry, in addition to the Berry's usual effect.

gale-wings.effect_short: Raises flying moves' priority by one stage.
gale-wings.effect_long: Raises flying moves' priority by one stage.
gale-wings.flavor: Gives priority to the Pokémon's Flying-type moves while its HP is full.

flower-veil.desc: Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokémon’s stats.
flower-veil.effect_short: Protects friendly grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.
flower-veil.effect_long: Protects friendly grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.
flower-veil.flavor: Ally Grass-type Pokémon are protected from status conditions and the lowering of their stats.

symbiosis.desc: The Pokémon can pass an item to an ally.
symbiosis.effect_short: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.
symbiosis.effect_long: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.
symbiosis.flavor: The Pokémon passes its held item to an ally that has used up an item.

grass-pelt.desc: Boosts the Defense stat in Grassy Terrain.
grass-pelt.effect_short: Boosts Defense while grassy terrain is in effect.
grass-pelt.effect_long: Boosts Defense while grassy terrain is in effect.
grass-pelt.flavor: Boosts the Pokémon's Defense stat on Grassy Terrain.

fur-coat.flavor: Halves the damage from physical moves.

stance-change.desc: The Pokémon changes form depending on how it battles.
stance-change.effect_short: Changes aegislash to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using kings shield.
stance-change.effect_long: Changes aegislash to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using kings shield.
stance-change.flavor: The Pokémon changes its form to Blade Forme when it uses an attack move and changes to Shield Forme when it uses King’s Shield.

aroma-veil.desc: Protects allies from attacks that limit their move choices.
aroma-veil.effect_short: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
aroma-veil.effect_long: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
aroma-veil.flavor: Protects the Pokémon and its allies from effects that prevent the use of moves.

sweet-veil.desc: Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.
sweet-veil.flavor: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from falling asleep.

tough-claws.desc: Powers up moves that make direct contact.
tough-claws.effect_short: Strengthens moves that make contact to 1.33× their power.
tough-claws.effect_long: Strengthens moves that make contact to 1.33× their power.
tough-claws.flavor: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

mega-launcher.desc: Powers up aura and pulse moves.
mega-launcher.effect_short: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5× their power.
mega-launcher.effect_long: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5× their power.

strong-jaw.desc: The Pokémon’s strong jaw gives it tremendous biting power.
strong-jaw.effect_short: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.
strong-jaw.effect_long: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.
strong-jaw.flavor: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.

refrigerate.effect_short: Turns the bearer's normal moves into ice moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
refrigerate.effect_long: Turns the bearer's normal-type moves into ice-type moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.
refrigerate.flavor: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

pixilate.effect_short: Turns the bearer's normal moves into fairy moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
pixilate.effect_long: Turns the bearer's normal-type moves into fairy moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.
pixilate.flavor: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

gooey.desc: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker’s Speed stat.
gooey.effect_short: Lowers attacking Pokémon's Speed by one stage on contact.
gooey.effect_long: Lowers attacking Pokémon's Speed by one stage on contact.
gooey.flavor: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.

fairy-aura.desc: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.
fairy-aura.effect_short: Strengthens fairy moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
fairy-aura.effect_long: Strengthens fairy moves for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
fairy-aura.flavor: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.

dark-aura.desc: Powers up each Pokémon’s Dark-type moves.
dark-aura.effect_short: Strengthens dark moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
dark-aura.effect_long: Strengthens dark moves for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
dark-aura.flavor: Powers up each Pokémon’s Dark-type moves.

aura-break.desc: The effects of “Aura” Abilities are reversed.
aura-break.effect_short: Makes dark aura and fairy aura weaken moves of their respective types.
aura-break.effect_long: While this Pokémon is on the field, dark aura and fairy aura weaken moves of their respective types to 2/3 their power, rather than strengthening them.
aura-break.flavor: The effects of “Aura” Abilities are reversed to lower the power of affected moves.

long-reach.desc: The Pokémon uses its moves without making contact with the target.
long-reach.effect_short: This Pokémon's moves do not make contact.
long-reach.effect_long: A move used by this Pokémon will not make contact.
long-reach.flavor: The Pokémon uses its moves without making contact with the target.

liquid-voice.desc: All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.
liquid-voice.effect_long: When this Pokémon uses a move that is sound-based, that move's type is Water.

stakeout.desc: Doubles the damage dealt to the target’s replacement if the target switches out.
stakeout.effect_short: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.
stakeout.effect_long: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.
stakeout.flavor: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.

battery.desc: Powers up ally Pokémon’s special moves.
battery.effect_short: Ally Pokémon's moves have their power increased to 1.3×.
battery.effect_long: Ally Pokémon's moves have their power increased to 1.3×.
battery.flavor: Powers up ally Pokémon's special moves.

dancer.desc: When another Pokémon uses a dance move, it can use a dance move following it regardless of its Speed.
dancer.effect_short: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
dancer.effect_long: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
dancer.flavor: Whenever a dance move is used in battle, the Pokémon will copy the user to immediately perform that dance move itself.

schooling.desc: When it has a lot of HP, the Pokémon forms a powerful school. It stops schooling when its HP is low.
schooling.effect_short: Wishiwashi becomes Schooling Form when its HP is 25% or higher.
schooling.effect_long: If this Pokémon is a wishiwashi and level 20 or above, then when it enters battle and at the start of each turn, it becomes Schooling Form if its HP is 25% or higher and Solo Form otherwise.  This ability cannot be replaced, copied, or nullified.
schooling.flavor: When it has a lot of HP, the Pokémon forms a powerful school. It stops schooling when its HP is low.

merciless.desc: The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.
merciless.effect_short: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
merciless.effect_long: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
merciless.flavor: The Pokémon's attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

stamina.desc: Boosts the Defense stat when hit by an attack.
stamina.effect_short: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
stamina.effect_long: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
stamina.flavor: Boosts the Defense stat when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

water-bubble.desc: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves done to the Pokémon and prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.
water-bubble.effect_short: Halves damage from Fire moves, doubles damage of Water moves, and prevents burns.
water-bubble.effect_long: When this Pokémon is hit by a Fire move, the damage is halved.  When this Pokémon uses a Water move, the power is doubled. This Pokémon cannot be burned, and if it becomes burned, the burn is immediately cured.
water-bubble.flavor: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves that hit the Pokémon and prevents it from being burned.

corrosion.desc: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it’s a Steel or Poison type.
corrosion.effect_short: This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.
corrosion.effect_long: This Pokémon's moves and item ignore the usual immunity of Poison and Steel Pokémon when attempting to inflict poison.
corrosion.flavor: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it's a Steel or Poison type.

fluffy.desc: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.
fluffy.effect_short: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.
fluffy.effect_long: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.
fluffy.flavor: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.

queenly-majesty.desc: Its majesty pressures the opposing Pokémon, making it unable to attack using priority moves.
queenly-majesty.effect_short: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
queenly-majesty.effect_long: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.
queenly-majesty.flavor: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

triage.desc: Gives priority to a healing move.
triage.effect_short: This Pokémon's healing moves have their priority increased by 3.
triage.effect_long: This Pokémon's healing moves have their priority increased by 3.
triage.flavor: Gives priority to the Pokémon's healing moves.

receiver.desc: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

wimp-out.desc: The Pokémon cowardly switches out when its HP becomes half or less.
wimp-out.effect_short: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.
wimp-out.effect_long: After this Pokémon is hit by a move, if that move caused this Pokémon's HP to drop below half, it switches out.
wimp-out.flavor: The Pokémon cowardly switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

emergency-exit.desc: The Pokémon, sensing danger, switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

emergency-exit.effect_long: After this Pokémon is hit by a move, if that move caused this Pokémon's HP to drop below half, it switches out.
emergency-exit.flavor: The Pokémon, sensing danger, switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

water-compaction.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat sharply when hit by a Water-type move.

water-compaction.effect_long: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by two stages when it's hit by a Water move.
water-compaction.flavor: Boosts the Defense stat sharply when the Pokémon is hit by a Water-type move.

innards-out.desc: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.
innards-out.effect_short: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.
innards-out.effect_long: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.

rks-system.desc: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the memory disc it holds.
rks-system.effect_short: Changes this Pokémon's type to match its held Memory.
rks-system.effect_long: Changes this Pokémon's type to match its held Memory.  This ability cannot be copied, replaced, or nullified.  This ability only takes effect for Silvally.
rks-system.flavor: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the memory disc it holds.

shields-down.desc: When its HP becomes half or less, the Pokémon’s shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.
shields-down.effect_short: Transforms this Minior between Core Form and Meteor Form.  Prevents major status ailments and drowsiness while in Meteor Form.
shields-down.effect_long: When this Pokémon enters battle and at the end of each turn, if its HP is 50% or above, it changes into Meteor Form; otherwise, it changes into Core Form.  In Meteor Form, it cannot be given a major status ailment (though existing ones are not cured), cannot become drowsy from yawn, and cannot use rest (which will simply fail).  This ability cannot be copied, replaced, or nullified.  This ability only takes effect for Minior.
shields-down.flavor: When its HP drops to half or less, the Pokémon's shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.

comatose.desc: It’s always drowsing and will never wake up. It can attack without waking up.
comatose.effect_short: This Pokémon always  acts as though it were Asleep.
comatose.effect_long: This Pokémon always acts as though it were Asleep.  It cannot be given another status ailment; it's unaffected by yawn; it can use sleep talk; and so on.
comatose.flavor: The Pokémon is always drowsing and will never wake up. It can attack while in its sleeping state.

disguise.desc: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack.
disguise.effect_short: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.
disguise.effect_long: If this Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and takes damage from a move, it switches to its Busted Form and the damage is prevented.  Other effects are not prevented.  This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Mimikyu.

dazzling.desc: Surprises the opposing Pokémon, making it unable to attack using priority moves.

dazzling.effect_long: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.

berserk.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat when it takes a  hit that causes its HP to become half or less.

berserk.flavor: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat when it takes a hit that causes its HP to drop to half or less.

steelworker.effect_short: This Pokémon's Steel moves have 1.5× power.

thermal-exchange.flavor: Boosts the Attack stat when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire-type move. The Pokémon also cannot be burned.

good-as-gold.desc: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon's status moves.
good-as-gold.effect_long: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon’s status moves.
good-as-gold.flavor: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon's status moves.

tablets-of-ruin.desc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself.
tablets-of-ruin.effect_short: Lowers Attack of all Pokémon except itself.
tablets-of-ruin.effect_long: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself.
tablets-of-ruin.flavor: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself.

sword-of-ruin.desc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself.
sword-of-ruin.effect_short: Lowers Defense of all Pokémon except itself.
sword-of-ruin.effect_long: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself.
sword-of-ruin.flavor: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself.

vessel-of-ruin.desc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.
vessel-of-ruin.effect_short: Lowers Special Attack of all Pokémon except itself.
vessel-of-ruin.effect_long: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.
vessel-of-ruin.flavor: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.

beads-of-ruin.desc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.
beads-of-ruin.effect_short: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokémon except itself.
beads-of-ruin.effect_long: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.
beads-of-ruin.flavor: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.

orichalcum-pulse.desc: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.
orichalcum-pulse.effect_short: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.
orichalcum-pulse.effect_long: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.
orichalcum-pulse.flavor: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.

hadron-engine.desc: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.
hadron-engine.effect_short: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.
hadron-engine.effect_long: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.
hadron-engine.flavor: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

supersweet-syrup.desc: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle
supersweet-syrup.effect_short: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.
supersweet-syrup.effect_long: A sickly sweet scent spreads across the field the first time the Pokémon enters a battle, lowering the evasiveness of opposing Pokémon.
supersweet-syrup.flavor: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

hospitality.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP
hospitality.effect_short: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
hospitality.effect_long: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP.
hospitality.flavor: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP

toxic-chain.desc: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move
toxic-chain.effect_short: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.
toxic-chain.effect_long: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move.
toxic-chain.flavor: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move

tera-shift.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.
tera-shift.effect_short: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.
tera-shift.effect_long: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.
tera-shift.flavor: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

poison-puppeteer.desc: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
poison-puppeteer.effect_short: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
poison-puppeteer.effect_long: When a Pokémon is poisoned by any of Pecharunt's moves, it will also become confused.
poison-puppeteer.flavor: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
